---
title: "Breakpoint Motifs"
author: "Trish"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:



```{r libraries} 
library(tidyverse)

```

```{r read in files to form dataframe}
bpm_files <- list.files("C:/Users/pquin/OneDrive - National University of Ireland, Galway/Research Project/FinaleDB/Break_points_motifs", pattern = "bpm$", full.names = TRUE)

bpm.df <- bpm_files %>%
  set_names(basename(bpm_files)) %>%
  map_dfr(
    ~ read.delim(.x, header = FALSE), 
    .id = "file"
      )%>%
  rename(
    breakpoint_motif = V1, 
    frequency = V2
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    treatment = if_else(
      str_detect(file, "^Ascites"),
      "cancer",
      "control"
    )
    )

```

```{r finding mean values and plotting}

bp_motif_means <- bpm.df%>%
  group_by(breakpoint_motif, treatment)%>%
  summarise(mean_freq = mean(frequency))%>%
  ungroup()


differences_df <- bp_motif_means %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = treatment, values_from = mean_freq)%>%
  mutate(diff = (cancer - control)) %>%
  arrange(desc(diff))

top_differences <- bind_rows(
  differences_df %>% slice_head(n = 15),
  differences_df %>% slice_tail(n = 15)
) %>%
  mutate(breakpoint_motif = factor(breakpoint_motif, levels = breakpoint_motif))

#lollipop graph
lollipop_bp <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = top_differences, aes(x = breakpoint_motif, y = cancer, colour = "Mean Cancer Values"), size = 3) +
 geom_point(data = top_differences, aes(x = breakpoint_motif, y = control, colour = "Mean Control Values"), size = 3) +
  geom_segment(data = top_differences, aes(x = breakpoint_motif, xend = breakpoint_motif, y = cancer, yend = control), colour = "grey", linewidth = 1) +
  
  scale_colour_manual(
    name = "Treatment",
    values = c("Mean Cancer Values"= "blue",
               "Mean Control Values" = "magenta")
               
  ) +
  labs(y = "Differences between mean cancer and mean control values",
       x = "Breakpoint Motif",
       title = "Breakpoint Motifs showing the biggest differences between control and cancer conditions",
       subtitle = "Top 10 differences where cancer is greater & Top 10 differences where cancer is lower") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

lollipop_bp

ggsave("lollipop_bp.png")


```
```{r graphing top 10 absolute differences}

absDifferences_df <- bp_motif_means %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = treatment, values_from = mean_freq)%>%
  mutate(absDiff = (abs(cancer - control))) %>%
  arrange(desc(absDiff))

#by inspection, top 8 seem to form a group
#'big' jump between 8 and 9

top_absDifferences <- bind_rows(
  absDifferences_df %>% 
  slice_head(n = 8)) %>%
  mutate(breakpoint_motif = factor(breakpoint_motif, levels = breakpoint_motif))

#Boxplot of these top 8 absolute differences

top_list <- top_absDifferences %>%
  pull(breakpoint_motif)

selected_samples <- bpm.df[bpm.df$breakpoint_motif %in% top_list,]
selected_samples

ggplot(data = selected_samples, 
       aes(x = breakpoint_motif,
           y = frequency,
           fill = factor(treatment,
                         levels = c("control", "cancer")))) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Treatment", values = c("control" = "#00BFC4", "cancer" = "#F8766D")) +
  labs(x = "Breakpoint Motif",
       y = "Frequency",
       title = "Mean Values for Cancer and Control Samples",
       subtitle = "Top 8 (Absolute) Differences  ",
       fill = "Treatment") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(colour = "grey",linewidth = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.6),
    legend.key.width  = unit(0.3, "cm"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11)
    
    )
ggsave("abs_diff_bp.png")
    
    
  

```
```{r violin plot}
ggplot(data = selected_samples, 
       aes(x = breakpoint_motif,
           y = frequency,
           fill = factor(treatment,
                         levels = c("control", "cancer")))) +
  geom_violin() +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Treatment", values = c("control" = "#00BFC4", "cancer" = "#F8766D")) +
labs(x = "Breakpoint Motif",
       y = "Frequency",
       title = "Mean Values for Cancer and Control Samples",
       subtitle = "Top 8 (Absolute) Differences  ") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(colour = "grey",linewidth = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.6),
    #legend.key.width  = unit(0.3, "cm"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11))

ggsave("bp_violinplot.png")
      
```
`
```{r heatmaps}

bpm_mat <- bpm.df %>%
  select(file, breakpoint_motif, frequency)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = file,
              values_from = frequency) %>%
  column_to_rownames("breakpoint_motif")%>%
  as.matrix()

pheatmap(bpm_mat,
         show_rownames = FALSE,
         cutree_rows = 3)
  

```

```{r teasing out smaller clusters in heatmap}

hc <- hclust(dist(bpm_mat))

clusters <- cutree(hc, k = 3)

cluster1_rows <- bpm_mat[clusters == 1, ]

pheatmap(cluster1_rows,
         show_rownames = TRUE)


```
